preregistered_decision: Use one `(task_id, model, model_version, scaffold, k)` row as the task-level analysis unit; local QA rows are validation evidence only.
permitted_current_output: State the analysis unit and exclude local QA from model-performance summaries.
blocked_output: Do not aggregate reference/wrong local QA rows into model capability estimates.
upgrade_condition: Keep run_results schema and integrity audits synchronized with any analysis-unit change.

preregistered_decision: `successes_out_of_k` is a count; `pass_at_k` is binary and equals 1 only when at least one completed attempt succeeds.
evidence: required_fields_present=["attempts_completed", "k", "pass_at_k", "successes_out_of_k"]; primary_summary={"analysis_set": "primary_plan_coverage", "covered_cells_any": "1", "covered_cells_noninfra": "1", "group": "all", "group_by": "all", "infra_fail_rows": "1", "mean_pass_at_k": "0.0000", "notes": "Coverage of the planned accepted_v0 x scaffold sweep by committed provider rows.", "planned_cells": "18", "rows_noninfra": "1", "rows_total": "2", "successes": "0", "timeout_rows": "0", "wilson_high": "0.7935", "wilson_low": "0.0000"}
permitted_current_output: Report pass@k arithmetic and keep smoke rows separated from exact-k evidence.
blocked_output: Do not treat successes_out_of_k as pass@k or report k=1 smoke rows as pass@10 evidence.
upgrade_condition: Maintain pass@k boundary and run-integrity audits after every provider sweep.

preregistered_decision: Headline task-performance analyses use `accepted_v0` tasks only; calibration rows are separate and rejected rows are excluded.
permitted_current_output: Use accepted-core rows for local task-quality summaries and report calibration rows separately.
blocked_output: Do not mix calibration or rejected rows into accepted-core pass-rate claims.
upgrade_condition: Recompute plan rows after any accepted/calibration/rejected metadata status change.

preregistered_decision: The primary scaffold ladder is `one-shot`, `lookup`, and `lookup_unlimited`, crossed with every accepted task at fixed k.
permitted_current_output: Describe the planned scaffold ladder and current coverage status.
blocked_output: Do not claim lookup or iterative-debug effects until every reported scaffold cell is covered for the same task/model set.
upgrade_condition: Run all accepted_v0 x scaffold cells for each reported model version.

preregistered_decision: A primary pass@k cell is reportable only when non-infra rows cover the planned task/scaffold/model at the planned k.
permitted_current_output: Report coverage and blocked-performance status only.
blocked_output: Do not report aggregate accepted-core pass@k estimates or intervals from incomplete planned cells.
upgrade_condition: Cover all planned accepted-core cells with non-infra rows at the planned k.

preregistered_decision: Retain infra failures and timeouts in raw run data and reliability summaries; exclude infra failures from capability means.
evidence: accepted_summary={"analysis_set": "accepted_core_results", "covered_cells_any": "1", "covered_cells_noninfra": "1", "group": "all", "group_by": "all", "infra_fail_rows": "1", "mean_pass_at_k": "0.0000", "notes": "Committed accepted-core provider rows only. This is far below the planned sweep.", "planned_cells": "18", "rows_noninfra": "1", "rows_total": "2", "successes": "0", "timeout_rows": "0", "wilson_high": "0.7935", "wilson_low": "0.0000"}
permitted_current_output: Report infra rows as provenance/reliability evidence only.
blocked_output: Do not silently drop infra failures from raw data or count them as solved capability rows.
upgrade_condition: Keep infra/timeout fields required in run_results and rerun integrity audits after sweeps.

preregistered_decision: For binary task-row means, report Wilson 95% intervals only after the planned cells for the stated analysis set are covered.
permitted_current_output: Show precision planning and blocked claim tiers.
blocked_output: Do not display performance intervals for the accepted core while planned coverage is missing.
upgrade_condition: Meet the minimum evidence row for the relevant statistical claim tier.

preregistered_decision: Family, bucket, and skill summaries with fewer than five accepted tasks per reported group are coverage tables, not stable estimates.
permitted_current_output: Report family and bucket composition with singleton caveats.
blocked_output: Do not interpret singleton family, skill, or T3 rows as stable subgroup performance estimates.
upgrade_condition: Reach at least five accepted tasks in every reported subgroup before interpreting subgroup means.

preregistered_decision: Scaffold deltas must compare the same accepted task set, model version, planned k, and non-infra rows across scaffolds.
permitted_current_output: State scaffold deltas as planned analyses only.
blocked_output: Do not infer lookup or iterative-debug gains from one-shot-only smoke rows.
upgrade_condition: Collect complete paired rows for every accepted task under each reported scaffold.

preregistered_decision: Failure distributions require transcript-reviewed non-infra failures and use the committed failure-label codebook.
permitted_current_output: Report the transcript-review workflow and smoke labels as provenance only.
blocked_output: Do not claim dominant failure modes from single-review smoke rows or unreviewed transcripts.
upgrade_condition: Collect enough non-infra failed provider rows and independent review labels before reporting distributions.

preregistered_decision: Human-time trends require independent Lean-human timing; never infer human time from model pass rates.
permitted_current_output: Report author/reviewer p50/p90 estimates and missing independent timing as a limitation.
blocked_output: Do not claim calibrated time-horizon scaling from metadata estimates alone.
upgrade_condition: Collect independent timing observations for every accepted task before freeze.

preregistered_decision: Locked-benchmark claims require hosted QA, Env Linter disposition, exact problem-version mapping, and final source/export hashes.
permitted_current_output: State local readiness and hosted-QA blockers.
blocked_output: Do not call the artifact hosted-QA-cleared, frozen, or locked.
upgrade_condition: Run hosted Full Env QA/Env Linter and commit exact version evidence before freeze.
